summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Argent Large Cap ETF (ABIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, narrow selection of US large-cap stocks. The selection process is heavily based on fundamental research and weighted based on analyst conviction ABIG was launched on Apr 9, 2025 and is issued by Argent.

holdings.infoBox: ABIG is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.10%, Amazon.com at 8.99%, Alphabet at 8.80%, Microsoft at 5.79%, and Applied Materials at 5.23%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
